title: DarkTPA
body:
# DarkTPA 
DarkTPA is a Simple, Quick, and Efficient Spigot 1.21+ Plugin that adds Common TPA Commands Such as /tpa, /tpahere, /tpdeny, /tpaccept, and more.
## Bug Reporting
Join Our Discord dsc.gg/arizaltd
Or Message jamie.local on discord.

# NOTICE

Archived as of 3/7/2026
- updates will not continue.

### Github
[Fork for your own Modification](https://github.com/Jamie-local/DarkTPA)
